title: arctostaphylos mewukka subsp. mewukka
intro: Arctostaphylos mewukka subsp. mewukka, also known as Bigberry manzanita, is a plant species native to California in the United States. It is a shrub in the heath family (Ericaceae) that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bigberry manzanita include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Bigberry manzanita can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
